CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR);
SELECT function_name, parameters, parameter_types, return_type FROM duckdb_functions() WHERE function_name LIKE 'ST_%';
SELECT * FROM (SELECT function_name, parameters FROM duckdb_functions()) AS f WHERE parameters IS NOT NULL;
SELECT function_name FROM duckdb_functions() WHERE function_name LIKE 'ST_%' AND parameters LIKE '%int%';
CALL duckdb_functions() WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table WHERE id > 10);
SELECT DISTINCT function_name FROM (SELECT function_name, return_type FROM duckdb_functions()) AS func WHERE return_type IS NOT NULL;
CALL duckdb_functions() WHERE function_name IN (SELECT function_name FROM duckdb_functions() WHERE parameters LIKE '%json%');
SELECT * FROM duckdb_functions() AS df JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table) AS tt ON df.parameters LIKE CONCAT('%', tt.id, '%');
